effect_summary: Fresh PM -> E3 -> BB -> PM review authorizes only forward-only P2-2 source implementation and an isolated Docker PostgreSQL double-apply. It records a stale Linux source head as a fail-closed preapply blocker rather than treating a role review as runtime authority.

preapply_blocker.required_resolution: post-implementation commit/push, three-head alignment, clean Linux recheck, V151-only dry-run/apply recheck

next_action: PA/E1 implement P2-2 persistence contract and exercise it only in an isolated Docker PostgreSQL instance.
